text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yawn... Man, I'm beat. I can't stop yawning.
choice_data_list: Did you not get enough sleep?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I was reading a cookbook last night, and
sleepiness hit me like a truck.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I kept telling myself that fallin' asleep would
mean I'd lost, so I fought against my drowsiness,
tooth and nail!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I came out the winner! Held out until
dawn—drowsiness got nothin' on me! Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In short, Hishi Amazon pulled an all-nighter.
